name: THE ANALYST READOUT

sections.guidance: The business question verbatim; the reader must know what is being answered.
Charts in reading order, strongest first; declared inputs only.
What explains the shape, with the competing explanation named and excluded.
The finding, stated without a recommendation; the reader decides.

example: Test pass rate CH-TIM-01; year-on-year slope CH-TIM-05
Improvement tracks the new inspection gate, not headcount
Finding: pass rate up 9 points since the gate landed
